data.processing_time: New students: Visas can be issued up to 365 days before the start date of a course of study, but entry to the United States is not allowed more than 30 days before the start date. Continuing students: Visas may be issued at any time as long as the student is currently enrolled at a SEVP-approved school or institution and in SEVIS, and entry is allowed at any time before classes start. Interview wait times vary by location, season, and visa category. Application may require further administrative processing after the interview.

essential_apps.description: Helps manage mail, track packages, find post office locations, and schedule pickups for an essential federal service.
Manages prescriptions, finds CVS stores and MinuteClinics, and accesses digital coupons from one of the largest pharmacy chains.
Provides comprehensive navigation for driving, walking, cycling, and public transport across all US cities.
A widely used peer-to-peer payment app for sending and receiving money, splitting bills, and making purchases.
